notes: Fixed multiple TikTok emotes in one message - all emotes now render instead of just the first one
Fixed TikTok emote-only messages now show all emotes correctly in both pop-out chat and HTML overlay
Fixed HTML overlay showing 'did something' for TikTok like events - now shows '❤️ user liked ×N!'
HTML overlay and pop-out chat now have matching emote rendering logic
TikTok native inline emotes now render as images in chat - emotes sent via the TikTok emote picker appear as pictures instead of blank spaces
Fixed emote-only TikTok messages now display correctly instead of showing a blank row
Fixed text around TikTok native emotes rendering correctly - placeholder space is stripped and surrounding words are preserved
Fixed auto-updater: DETACHED_PROCESS and CREATE_NEW_CONSOLE are mutually exclusive Windows flags - combining them caused undefined behavior where the updater bat silently failed to run
Fixed auto-updater: shell=True with extra quoting caused cmd.exe to misparse the bat path
Updater now launches via cmd.exe directly with no flag conflicts and a visible console window
Fixed 'still running in the background' tray popup appearing during auto-update quit
Auto-updater now retries the file copy up to 12 times so a slow process exit or brief AV scan delay no longer silently kills the update
Downloaded exe is validated as a real Windows executable before installing - shows an error if antivirus blocked the download or the release asset is missing
Updater window stays visible during install so any copy errors are shown with instructions instead of disappearing silently
Version number now shows correctly in dashboard and sidebar (was stuck at v0.9.0-beta)
All versions now display with -beta suffix
TikTok emote-only messages no longer show as blank rows - show [emote] placeholder when native emote data is present, silently skip if truly empty
Added comprehensive CommentEvent field logging to tiktok_debug.log to diagnose native emote format
Fixed TikTok chat messages completely silenced - on_comment handler now uses defensive attribute access (event.comment / event.content / event.msg) so it works across all TikTokLive library versions
on_comment errors now log to tiktok_debug.log with full traceback and available event attributes to help diagnose version mismatches
Fixed like/share/follow event text appearing black/invisible in pop-out chat - now uses consistent bright text color instead of platform color
Fixed animated emotes no longer animating in pop-out chat (regression from 0.9.15)
Fixed multiple emotes in one message not all showing in pop-out chat (regression from 0.9.15)
Fixed long emote messages overflowing pop-out chat width
Font size setting now scales username labels in pop-out chat
Emote image size in pop-out chat now scales with font size
Fixed /me action messages showing as '[] ACTION text' â€” now renders correctly as italicized text in the sender's username color
Action message fix applies to both the pop-out chat window and the HTML overlay
Fixed emote messages overflowing the pop-out chat width â€” emotes now wrap correctly alongside long text
Overlay and Pop-out Chat settings are now separated into two side-by-side columns in the Appearance page
Pop-out Chat has its own independent Max messages, Font size, and Compact mode settings
Removed Save button from Appearance page â€” settings save automatically with a small toast notification in the top-right corner
Font size setting now applies to the pop-out chat window, not just the HTML overlay
Pop-out chat now has an Always on Top toggle button â€” keeps the chat window above all other apps
Always on Top preference is saved and restored when you reopen the pop-out
Updates page now checks for new versions every 60 seconds automatically
Added Check Now button on the Updates page so you can manually trigger a check without restarting
Last checked time shown next to the Check Now button
Add-ons support â€” external tools (e.g. plagLerts) can now connect to a secondary WebSocket endpoint (/addons/ws) and receive the full event stream
Add-ons endpoint is disabled by default with zero impact on existing behavior
Optional secret token for authenticating add-on connections
New Add-ons page in the sidebar with enable toggle, token field, live connection count, and one-click URL copy
Fixed YouTube channel name showing blank after re-authentication when API quota was exhausted
App now preserves the last known channel name instead of overwriting it with an empty string
Fixed activity log spam â€” identical consecutive status messages are now deduplicated
Replaced hundreds of repeated 'Watching for your live stream to startâ€¦' lines with a single entry that only updates when something actually changes
Fixed YouTube connection dropping after 1-2 hours and not recovering
YouTube now reads the real token expiry from Google's response instead of assuming 3600s
YouTube now detects invalid_grant (revoked/expired session) and tells you to Re-authenticate instead of silently retrying forever
YouTube now detects a stale live chat ID (404/410) and immediately re-queries the broadcast instead of polling a dead endpoint
After 8 consecutive poll failures YouTube reconnects automatically rather than staying stuck
Reconnect attempts are now logged so you can see the app is actively trying
Fixed a missing disconnected signal when a mid-stream token refresh fails
Sub and gift sub events are now visually prominent - purple glow for subs, gold glow for gift subs, in both pop-out chat and HTML overlay
Sub messages now include total months, month streak, and tier (e.g. 'ðŸŽ‰ user resubscribed!  14 months total  ðŸ”¥ 6-month streak')
Resub personal messages are shown as a second line below the sub event
Fixed compact mode messages not wrapping in the pop-out chat window
Fixed Update banner button being cut off on the right edge
Fixed Install Update immediately failing - auto-update now correctly downloads the release exe
Twitch Shared Chat toggle - show messages from partner channels in a shared session (off by default)
Fixed YouTube showing Login button despite already being authenticated
Fixed clicking Login doing nothing with no feedback when token already exists
Added Re-authenticate button to force a fresh Google login without losing settings
Activity log now shows quota status immediately when starting YouTube with an active quota gate
Fixed TikTok custom emotes not rendering in native chat window
Added raw comment debug logging to tiktok_debug.log to diagnose emote format issues
YouTube quota exceeded now sleeps until midnight PT instead of a flat 1 hour
Quota reset timestamp is persisted so app restarts no longer immediately retry when quota is still exhausted
BTTV emotes for YouTube are now loaded once per session instead of on every reconnect attempt
TikTok custom emotes - drop PNG/GIF files into the tiktok_emotes/ folder and they render as images in chat
TikTok native bracket emotes (e.g. [laugh], [heart]) now convert to emoji automatically
Custom emotes reload on every TikTok reconnect so no app restart is needed after adding new emotes
One-click in-app auto-update - install new versions without leaving plagComms
BTTV emote support for YouTube Live Chat
Animated emote support (GIF emotes now animate in native chat window)
7TV emote support for Twitch chat
Announcement messages now show a rainbow border highlight
Channel point redemptions now display the reward name correctly
YouTube API quota exceeded no longer spams the activity log
Build script now auto-names the exe with the version number
Initial beta release
Twitch, TikTok, and YouTube Live chat aggregation
HTML overlay for OBS browser source
Native pop-out chat window
Per-platform color coding and event notifications
